mappings.control_id: Rogue agent detected but not offboarded — credentials remain valid

mappings.control_id: Rogue agent with excess privilege causes larger blast radius before detection
mappings.notes: Least privilege — rogue agent with narrow scope causes less damage before containment

mappings.control_id: Long-lived tokens allow rogue agent to operate indefinitely after detection
mappings.notes: Short-lived credentials — rogue detection triggers token expiry without requiring manual revocation
